title: Mining Remediation Authority business plan 2025 to 2028
body: "This plan lays out our priorities for delivery, including:   emergency response for subsidence and hazards preventing mine water from polluting drinking water, rivers or the sea enabling growth, housing and development in coalfield areas providing information and reports to help homeowners, infrastructure providers and others make informed decisions    Customer services, mining reports and records   Mining Remediation Authority200 Lichfield LaneMansfieldNottinghamshireNG18 4RG     Email customerservice@miningremediation.gov.uk     Telephone 0345 762 6848      "
